prompt:
# Render request (prompt timesheet-v1) Module: timesheet-web Stack: python-lib ## Definitions - App factory: `create_web_app(store_path)` returning a FastAPI application bound to one store file. - Entries page: the HTML document served at `GET /` listing entries and hosting the add form. - Entry row: a `` carrying `data-testid="entry-row"` that shows one entry's id, person, project, date, hours, and status badge. - Add form: the `
` carrying `data-testid="add-form"` that posts fields `person`, `project`, `date`, and `hours` to `POST /entries`. - Error page: an HTML response rendered through the ui-kit page shell whose body contains a `ts-error` element naming the problem. - Style lock: every HTML response is built with the ui-kit `page` shell, contains no `style=` attribute, and every `class` attribute names only `ts-`-prefixed kit classes. ## Implementation requirements - Use Python 3.12. - Expose `create_web_app(store_path)` from `src/timesheet_web/`. - Declare `fastapi`, `httpx`, and `python-multipart` in the generated `pyproject.toml` `[project]` dependencies. - Persist entries only through the required timestore module and enforce every rule only through the required rules module; the app holds no state of its own. - Build every HTML response — the entries page and every error page — by passing body markup to the required ui-kit module's `page`; never emit a `
response:
{"summary": "Implement FR1: entries page (GET /) with styled table/empty state, add-form markup, HTML escaping, and ui-kit style-lock compliance.", "files": [{"path": "src/timesheet_web/__init__.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"Web application factory for the timesheet example.""" from .app import create_web_app __all__ = ["create_web_app"] "}, {"path": "src/timesheet_web/app.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"FastAPI application serving the timesheet entries page.""" from __future__ import annotations import html import os from typing import Any from fastapi import FastAPI from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse from timestore import TimeStore from ui_kit import page def create_web_app(store_path: str | os.PathLike[str] | None = None) -> FastAPI: """Build a FastAPI app bound to a single timesheet store file.""" app = FastAPI() store = TimeStore(store_path) @app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse) def entries_page() -> str: entries = store.list_entries() return page("Timesheet", _render_body(entries)) return app def _render_body(entries: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str: if entries: rows = "".join(_render_row(entry) for entry in entries) listing = ( '' "" "" "" "" f"{rows}" "
IdPersonProjectDateHoursStatus
" ) else: listing = '

No entries yet.

' add_form = ( '
' '' '' '' '' '' "
" ) return ( '

Timesheet

' f"{listing}" f"{add_form}" ) def _render_row(entry: dict[str, Any]) -> str: entry_id = html.escape(str(entry["id"])) person = html.escape(str(entry["person"])) project = html.escape(str(entry["project"])) date = html.escape(str(entry["date"])) hours = html.escape(str(entry["hours"])) status = html.escape(str(entry["status"])) return ( '' f"{entry_id}" f"{person}" f"{project}" f"{date}" f"{hours}" f'{status}' "" ) "}, {"path": "tests/test_app.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"Unit tests for the timesheet-web entries page (FR1).""" from __future__ import annotations import re from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timestore import TimeStore from timesheet_web import create_web_app from ui_kit import TOKENS_CSS def test_empty_store_shows_empty_state(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 assert 'class="ts-empty"' in response.text assert 'data-testid="add-form"' in response.text assert 'data-testid="entry-row"' not in response.text def test_stored_entry_renders_row_with_status_badge(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Ada Lovelace", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.text.count('data-testid="entry-row"') == 1 assert "Ada Lovelace" in response.text assert 'ts-badge--draft' in response.text def test_store_sourced_values_are_html_escaped(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Grace Hopper", "Ops", "2026-07-06", 2.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert "<b>Ops</b>" in response.text assert "Ops" not in response.text def test_style_lock_holds(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Ada Lovelace", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") text = response.text assert text.count(TOKENS_CSS) == 1 assert 'style="' not in text for class_value in re.findall(r'class="([^"]*)"', text): for name in class_value.split(): assert name.startswith("ts-"), name "}, {"path": "pyproject.toml", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": "[project] name = "timesheet-web" version = "0.1.0" requires-python = ">=3.12" dependencies = [ "fastapi", "httpx", "python-multipart", ] [build-system] requires = ["hatchling"] build-backend = "hatchling.build" [tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ["src/timesheet_web"] "}, {"path": "FR1/test_fr1.py", "action": "write", "root": "conformance", "contents": """"Conformance tests for FR1: entries page and style lock.""" from __future__ import annotations import re from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timestore import TimeStore from timesheet_web import create_web_app from ui_kit import TOKENS_CSS def test_entry_row_person_and_status_badge(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Ada Lovelace", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.text.count('data-testid="entry-row"') == 1 assert "Ada Lovelace" in response.text assert 'ts-badge--draft' in response.text def test_empty_store_shows_empty_state_and_add_form(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert response.status_code == 200 assert 'class="ts-empty"' in response.text assert 'data-testid="add-form"' in response.text assert 'data-testid="entry-row"' not in response.text def test_store_sourced_project_is_html_escaped(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Grace Hopper", "Ops", "2026-07-06", 2.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") assert "<b>Ops</b>" in response.text assert "Ops" not in response.text def test_style_lock_on_entries_page(tmp_path): store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" TimeStore(store_path).add_entry("Ada Lovelace", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) app = create_web_app(store_path) client = TestClient(app) response = client.get("/") text = response.text assert text.count(TOKENS_CSS) == 1 assert 'style="' not in text for class_value in re.findall(r'class="([^"]*)"', text): for name in class_value.split(): assert name.startswith("ts-"), name "}]}
